title: Sanjay Gandhi – Sanjay Gandhi Hospital
text: Sanjay Gandhi – Sanjay Gandhi Hospital Skip to content Emergency Helpline Number: 080-2656 4516 Email: sitodirector@gmail.com Secure Health Secure Nation Restoring mobility, rebuilding lives with expert trauma and orthopaedic care. Honorable Chief Minister Sri D. K. Shivakumar Deputy Chief Minister Sri G. Parameshwara Medical Education Minister Dr. Sharan Prakash Patil Mr. Mohammad Mohsin Addl. Chief Secretary, Medical Education Department Dr. Sujatha Rathod Director Medical Education Director SGITO Dr. Madan Ballal This is one of the well-established Trauma and Orthopaedics centers, started by the Government of Karnataka in 1984 to cater to the poor and needy. Explore About Sanjay Gandhi Institute of Trauma and Orthopaedics Partners with Manipal Signa Health Insurance. We are pleased to announce that Sanjay Gandhi Institute of Trauma and Orthopaedics has tied up with Manipal Signa Health Insurance to provide comprehensive medical coverage to our patients, especially for those who have less than 2 lakhs package. This partnership aims to make quality orthopaedic healthcare more accessible and affordable for individuals and families. With Manipal Signa Health Insurance, our patients can enjoy cashless treatment, hassle-free claims, and a wide range of orthopaedic services. Explore “ We are committed to treating every patient as a unique individual, recognizing them as part of a family and a larger community. We believe that all patients deserve comprehensive support—physical, emotional, psychological, and social—irrespective of their religion, region, language, or economic background. ” Directors Desk Explore Accreditation Explore Seniority List Explore Interesting Cases “Warning: Sensitive images ahead.” Explore Infrastructure Explore POSH Explore Academic Course Postgraduate Course Explore Fellowship Courses Explore Skill Lab Explore Library Explore Allied Health Sciences Explore Physiotherapy Explore College Of Nursing Explore DEPARTMENTS Departments Orthopaedics Sanjay gandhi institute of trauma & orthopaedics is a premiere autonomous… Anesthesia Our Anesthesia Department is integral to providing safe and effective pain management… Plastic Surgery Department of Plastic and Reconstructive surgery focuses on restoring… Facio Maxillary Oral and maxillofacial surgery ( OMFS ) specializes in treating many diseases… Neuro Surgery The department of neurosurgery is one of the major departments to support the trauma centre… General Surgery The Department of General Surgery at SGITO offers general surgical care to trauma patients… Vascular Surgery The department deals with management of hand, wrist and elbow injuries, Brachial plexus… Urology The Department of Urology at SGITO offers Urology care to patients… Laboratory The diagnostic laboratory services is committed to deliver most precise , accurate and reliable services… Radiology The department of radiology is contemporary and equipped with state-of-the-art equipments… Blood Bank Transfusion medicine (or transfusiology) is the branch of medicine that is concerned with transfusion… General Medicine The Department of General Medicine is complimentary to all specialties in providing… Casualty Our state-of-the-art casualty department operates 24/7 to provide immediate care for trauma and orthopaedic emergencies. Administration The Administration Department ensures seamless management and efficient functioning of all hospital operations. “Women’s safety is vital for a healthy society. Empowering protection and support fosters confidence and growth.” WOMENS HELPLINE 080-2656 4516 sgitoposh@gmail.com NOTIFICATIONS Notifications Student Notification Fellowship Admission Notification 2024-25 Application form : Fellowship admission 2024-25 List of Selected Candidates. The team not only provided expert treatment but also supported us emotionally during a difficult time. Thank you for giving us hope and excellent care.” Neha R., Mysuru “The care I received at Sanjay Gandhi Institute of Trauma and Orthopaedics was exceptional. The doctors and staff were compassionate, attentive, and ensured my recovery was smooth. I’m grateful for the world-class treatment I experienced.” Rahul M., Bengaluru SCHEMES Schemes Mukyamanthri Medical Relief Fund Jyothi Sanjeevini Karnataka Disabled Welfare Fund ESI CGHS Hatti Gold Mine Health Scheme BBMP Contact sitodirector@gmail.com 080-26564516 Location Sanjay Gandhi Institute of Trauma & Orthopaedics 1st Block, Byrasandra, Jayanagar East, Bangalore -560 011 About Us Academic Course Administration Committees Facilities Statistics Tenders Contact Us About Us Academic Course Administration Committees Facilities Statistics Tenders Contact Us Trauma Services Arthroscopy Foot And Ankle Hand Surgery Pelvic Acetabular Department of Anesthesia Orthotic And Prosthetic Department of Biochemistry Casualty Trauma Services Arthroscopy Foot And Ankle Hand Surgery Pelvic Acetabular Department of Anesthesia Orthotic And Prosthetic Department of Biochemistry Casualty OT Services Pathology Physiotherapy Plastic Surgery Spine Surgery Arthroscopy Urology OT Services Pathology Physiotherapy Plastic Surgery Spine Surgery Arthroscopy Urology Hospital Guide Out Patient Department In Patient Department Neuro Surgery Pathology Hospital Guide Out Patient Department In Patient Department Neuro Surgery Pathology © Copyright 2024, All rights reserved.
